label: active
notes: Approved antiparasitic (malaria). IC50 430 nM against SmDHODH. Available in sub-Saharan Africa. Strong repurposing candidate.

label: active
notes: Current standard of care. Mechanism involves calcium influx causing worm paralysis. No target-based IC50 in ChEMBL but clinically proven effective.

label: active
notes: Older drug effective against S. mansoni only. Prodrug activated by parasite sulfotransferase. Largely replaced by praziquantel but still a known active.

label: active
notes: Antimalarial with demonstrated in vitro and in vivo activity against juvenile and adult schistosomes. Explored as combination partner with praziquantel.
